name: OmopLocationCareSiteView
title: Location → care_site (flat)
description: Secondary pattern: some implementations (notably fhir-to-omop-demo) create a care_site row from each FHIR Location resource, in addition to the primary care_site row from Organization. The Location-derived care_site row carries the location_id (linking to the location row from the same Location resource) while the Organization-derived row carries the name and place_of_service. The two rows share the same care_site_id and must be merged downstream. This pattern is NOT used by omoponfhir-v54, ETL-German, or NACHC.

column.name: care_site_id
column.description: Resolves to the Organization's care_site_id. Same care_site_id as the row produced by Organization -> care_site. The two rows describe the same care site.

column.name: location_id
column.description: Points to the location row produced from this same Location resource (see Location__location edge).
